prompt: Based on 1-3 clear personal photos uploaded by the user, please generate 8 different individual high-end retouched graduation portrait photos at once, unified in a 3:4 vertical composition. Theme: "High-End Luxury Magazine Graduation Portrait" Overall style reference: Korean-style high-end fashion magazine graduation visual aesthetic + high-end studio shooting quality + Chinese university academic dress system + emotional close-up portraits + fashion magazine cover feel. Note: The focus of this set is not ordinary graduation snapshots or assembly-line studio photos, but rather: "A set of high-quality graduation close-up visuals shot like a Chinese version of a fashion magazine." The overall output can have a magazine cover feel. --- ## I. Customizable Parameters - [Degree Level]: Bachelor - [Major Direction]: Management - [Institutional Vibe]: Finance and Economics University - [Academic Dress System]: Handled according to common Chinese university academic dress standards, with minor adjustments to the hood/stole/color based on the major - [Main Scene Vibe]: Minimalist studio / Red auditorium curtain / White background studio / Dark gray background / Graduation ceremony podium / Certificate studio scene - [Prop Preference]: Degree certificate / Graduation certificate / Framed certificate / Bouquet / Podium / Mortarboard / School badge elements / Chinese university graduation commemorative props - [Character Disposition]: Restrained high-end / Cold and elegant / Confident / Young elite feel / Gentle joy / Playful and agile - [Jewelry & Accessories]: Minimalist rings / Watch / Earrings - [Shooting Focus]: Close-up texture / Clothing details / Facial texture / Hand movements / Magazine feel --- ## II. Character Consistency Please strictly preserve the user's true identity characteristics, including but not limited to: - Face shape - Facial proportions - Eye shape - Nose shape - Lip shape - Skin tone - Sense of age - Hairstyle foundation - Body type - Overall temperament All 8 photos must clearly look like the same real face. Do not turn them into a stranger, do not over-Westernize, do not make them look like an internet celebrity, do not over-smooth the skin, and do not produce AI 'fake faces'. The character's temperament should retain a real high-end feel, like the person themselves upgraded into a set of high-end graduation magazine visuals, rather than a different professional model. Please use the uploaded photos only as a reference for identity; do not retain the realistic background, daily clothing, or original composition from the photos. --- ## III. Overall Positioning The core positioning of this set is: "Chinese Academic Dress Graduation Portrait x Korean High-End Fashion Magazine Aesthetic x Close-up Texture Visuals." The set must simultaneously possess: 1. A clear graduation theme 2. Clear Chinese university academic dress characteristics 3. A clear fashion magazine feel 4. Clear refined texture in close-ups/portraits 5. Clear emotion and character expression 6. Clear logic for Chinese graduation scenes and props. This is not a common commemorative graduation photo, but rather: "Like a cover story shot by a high-end Chinese fashion magazine for the graduation season." Overall aesthetic reference keywords: - Korean high-end magazine feel - Calm and high-end - Minimalist studio shooting - Fashion-forward graduation portrait - Clean and crisp composition - Prominent facial and hand details - Clear clothing and certificate details - Possessing both solemnity and youthfulness - A small amount of ritual and slight theatricality --- ## IV. Clothing Requirements (Sinicized Focus) Clothing must explicitly use the Chinese university academic dress/gown system, not Western graduation robes or Japanese/Korean school uniform-style graduation wear. ### Core Clothing Requirements: - Explicitly retain the silhouette of common Chinese university academic gowns - Retain the standard square mortarboard - Retain the tassel - Retain the Chinese academic dress hood/stole/piping system matching the [Degree Level] and [Major Direction] - Clothing details should be high-end, clean, crisp, with studio texture - The academic dress must be immediately recognizable as the Chinese version - Do not make it look like a Western graduation robe - Do not make it look like a stage costume - Do not make it look like low-cost studio clothing ### Degree Level Differentiation Please reflect different temperaments based on the [Degree Level]: - Bachelor: Younger, fresher, lighter, more youthful - Master: More mature, restrained, intellectual, stronger elite feel - Doctor: More solemn, more academic, with a greater sense of authority and ritual ### Major Direction Expression Please naturally reflect professional attributes according to the [Major Direction] through minor adjustments in hood color, certificates, bouquet tones, prop vibes, and character state. Follow common Chinese academic dress logic without necessarily being strictly realistic to a specific school. The focus is: Let people immediately feel "This is a graduation quality of a certain Chinese major." --- ## V. Prop Requirements (Sinicized Focus) Props must originate from the context of the Chinese graduation season rather than being completely Westernized. Priority props: - Common Chinese university degree certificate covers - Common Chinese university graduation certificate covers - Framed certificates - Graduation bouquets - School badge elements - Podium/Lectern/Oath platform - Faculty sashes/Honor sashes - Mortarboard - Graduation commemorative certificates - Graduation yearbooks - Outstanding graduate certificates/award-like props - Red auditorium curtains - Pure white studio background - Dark gray background - Chinese-style graduation ceremony atmosphere Overall prop requirements: - Clean and high-end - Do not pile too many - 1-2 core props per photo is sufficient - Must serve the character and graduation identity - Possess both a "graduation feel" and a "magazine feel" --- ## VI. Expression and Emotion Requirements (Focus) This set must focus on depicting expressions; not all photos can have the same template smile. Assign the following different emotions across the 8 photos: - Restrained smile - Quietly looking into the lens - Cold side-glance - Confident and calm - Solemnity during a speech - Joy of a young graduate - Relaxed laughter - Smiling with eyes closed - Slightly playful celebratory feel - A touch of high-end aloofness - A sense of achievement without over-exaggeration - Sense of ritual and glory - A slight fashion-shoot distance Requirements: - Natural expressions - No stiff fake smiles - No business-like smiles in every shot - No exaggerated internet celebrity expressions - Should look like real emotional moments captured during a magazine shoot --- ## VII. Photography and Texture Requirements (Focus) This set must emphasize close-ups, facial texture, academic dress texture, hand texture, and prop texture. ### Composition Requirements: Overall focus on: - Headshots - Half-body close-ups - Half-body medium close-ups - A small amount of 3/4 body shots Avoid large-scale wide shots. Do not shrink the character too much. The focus is: "Close-up feel, facial impact, local clothing details, interaction between certificates and hands." ### Texture Requirements: - High-end studio shooting - Clear and realistic skin texture - Delicate but not over-smoothed - Clear texture of academic dress fabric - Crispness in hoods/stoles/hats - Clear texture for certificate paper/covers/framed certificates/bouquets - Clear, restrained, and exquisite jewelry - Clean and sharp lighting - Simple and high-end visuals - High contrast but not messy - A bit of Korean coldness and fashion feel - Like a graduation visual actually shot for a fashion magazine ### Lighting Requirements: - High-end studio key light - Clear facial structure - No overexposure on hands - Layered black background scenes - Clean white backgrounds (not dead white) - Theatricality in red curtain scenes - Overall crisp, modern, and fashionable --- ## VIII. Hairstyle and Makeup ### Hairstyle Naturally design based on original character features, but the overall look should be more like a high-end magazine shoot styling. Can use: - Clean and sharp straight hair - Slightly wavy mid-length hair - Updo - Low ponytail - Clean slicked-back style - One side tucked behind the ear - Slightly fashion-forward low-saturation hair treatment Requirements: - Not too messy/daily life style - No over-the-top avant-garde fashion styling - Balance graduation identity with magazine quality ### Makeup - Clean base makeup - Transparent yet high-end - Clear eyebrows and eyes - Natural lip color or light rose tones - Can have a slight glow - No heavy makeup - No internet celebrity style makeup - No heavy false eyelashes - Should look like a Korean magazine cover makeup --- ## IX. Fixed Allocation for 8 Individual Photos Please output the following 8 different individual refined graduation photos: ### Photo 1 | Certificate Close-up Main Visual - Half-body close-up or headshot - Character wearing Chinese mortarboard and academic gown - Holding an open graduation/degree certificate - Certificate close to the lens, facial features clear - Restrained smile or quiet confidence - Simple dark gray or solid color background - Emphasize relationship between certificate, face, and hat - The best candidate for a magazine cover ### Photo 2 | Bouquet and Certificate Profile - Half-body or 3/4 body - Character holding a Chinese graduation bouquet and certificate cover - Looking toward the side or out of frame - Quiet, cool, and optimistic expression - Dark or pure black background - Highlight the colors of the Chinese graduation bouquet and gown hood ### Photo 3 | Auditorium Podium Oath - Half-body medium close-up - Character standing behind a podium/lectern - One hand raised as if taking an oath, defending a thesis, or speaking - One hand on the microphone or podium - Background is a Chinese graduation ceremony-style red curtain - Solemn, firm, and ritualistic expression - Emphasize the Chinese context of the ceremony ### Photo 4 | Celebratory Close-up - Headshot or close-up - Wearing academic dress, simple black or dark background - Small amount of gold confetti/celebratory atmosphere - Hands doing a relaxed natural celebration or a playful gesture near the face - Surprised, happy, young, and agile expression - The most youthful and energetic photo of the set ### Photo 5 | Framed Certificate and Glory - Half-body medium shot - Character holding a framed certificate, degree cover, or graduation materials - Can be paired with a minimalist handbag or personal style accessory - White or light gray pure studio background - Calm, fashion-forward, elite expression - Emphasize "graduation identity + personal style + sense of achievement" ### Photo 6 | Red Curtain Laughter - Half-body medium close-up - Red auditorium curtain background - Character holding a framed certificate - Expression is a genuine hearty laugh, eyes closed laugh, or relaxed smile - No fake smiles; show the relief and happiness of graduation day - The most infectious photo of the set ### Photo 7 | Bouquet Face-Veiling Soft Close-up - Close-up - Character holding a Chinese graduation bouquet - One hand lightly covering part of the cheek or corner of the mouth - Expression can be eyes closed smiling or shy light laughter - White or light gray background - Overall gentle, delicate, relaxed, and very magazine-like - Emphasize flower materials, hands, rings, watch, and facial close-up ### Photo 8 | Cold Emotional Closure - Close-up or headshot - Character wearing a mortarboard, chin resting on hands or fists - Cool, restrained, or thoughtful expression - Dark gray or solid background - Emphasize eyes, skin texture, hands, and jewelry details - The most fashionable, cold, and magazine-interior-like photo --- ## X. Unified Requirements The 8 photos must be unified in: - The same real face - The same Chinese academic dress system - The same Chinese mortarboard system - The same magazine studio texture - The same graduation theme - The same character makeup/styling logic - The same high-end fashion graduation portrait style The 8 photos must have obvious variations in: - Expression - Hand movements - Eye contact direction - Camera distance - Prop interaction - Background scenes - Emotional states --- ## XI. Clear Avoidances - No low-cost studio feel - No assembly-line graduation portrait feel - No modern daily selfie feel - No character face-changing - No over-Westernization - No internet celebrity faces - No over-smoothing - No plastic skin - No incorrect finger anatomy - No incorrect body structure - No cluttered backgrounds - No cheap props
